title: dual port blockram fails to synthesize ECP5

features.name: true_dual_port_ram_with_two_clock_domains
features.description: Code should include a true dual-port RAM with two independent always blocks using different clock signals (clkA and clkB) accessing a shared memory array, where both ports can read and write to the same address space

features.name: ecp5_synthesis_target_with_dualport_ram
features.description: Code should include a true dual-port RAM module being synthesized for ECP5 architecture using synth_ecp5, which does not support the $mem_v2 cell type required for true dual-port operation
